# Sub PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 104.862 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 4.6852
  biquad b0=1.00025407542 b1=-1.99872115263 b2=0.998514151955 a1=-1.99872115263 a2=0.99876822737
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 104.776 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 4.6847
  biquad b0=1.00025389209 b1=-1.99872212263 b2=0.998515228003 a1=-1.99872212263 a2=0.998769120091
Filter 3: ON PK Fc 19.517 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 3.1107
  biquad b0=1.0000712506 b1=-1.99965291982 b2=0.999583300585 a1=-1.99965291982 a2=0.999654551189

  biquad b0=1.0001654324 b1=-1.99918975922 b2=0.999032544125 a1=-1.99918975922 a2=0.999197976523

  biquad b0=0.999723909272 b1=-1.99912915832 b2=0.999419710951 a1=-1.99912915832 a2=0.999143620223
